title: AN ACT CREATING THE BARRIO OF PATONGA IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF CUYO, PROVINCE OF PALAWAN.

chunks.text:
H. NO. 3995 / 57 OG No. 11, 1951 (March 13, 1961)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 2874, June 19, 1960 ]

AN ACT CREATING THE BARRIO OF PATONGA IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF CUYO, PROVINCE OF PALAWAN.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The sitio of Patonga in the Municipality of Cuyo, Province of Palawan, is converted into a barrio of said municipality, to be known as the barrio of Patonga.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Enacted without Executive approval, June 19, 1960.
